description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a hip roof, featuring a combination of white and brown exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered porch area, a driveway leading to a carport, and large windows that provide ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a fence, with a small green lawn and paved pathways surrounding the house. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a secondary entrance, as well as a fenced backyard area. The roof is dark and gently sloped, complementing the clean, geometric lines of the structure. The overall design is contemporary, with an emphasis on open outdoor spaces and functional living areas.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a hip roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a fenced yard, featuring white and brown exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the carport, driveway, and fenced yard with a clear view of the hip roof and side windows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the backyard, secondary entrance, and additional windows, with the fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back entrance, fenced backyard, and a portion of the porch area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
